When Jupiter is vanquished by Venus, the Kulutas, Gandha-
ras, Kaikayas, Madras, Salvas, Vatsas, Vahgas, cattle and corn
will be affected. When he is overcome by Mars, the middle country,
kings and cows will suffer. When he is defeated by Saturn, the
Arjunayanas, Vasatis, Yaudheyas, Sibis and Brahmanas will be
harmed. When he is defeated by Mercury, the Mlecchas, truthful
men, soldiers and the middle country will be ruined. In addition,
those people and things belonging to Jupicer (vide XVI, 21-25
supra) will also be destroyed.
[Though the author mentions effect of planetary
rulership—only with reference to Jupiter and Venus, it is to be
